theme: You did not fail the room. You outgrew it.
core_metaphor: A brutalist pressure vault — environmental, architectural, psychological. NOT anatomical. NOT biological.
emotional_arc: recognition → compression → reframe → agency → expansion → loop
quote: The walls were not your limit. They were your warmup.

emotional_ratio_target.design_note: Previous versions were 80/20 pressure/liberation. This pivots at breakaway from diagnosis to agency. Supremacy is the emotional PEAK.

visual_escalation_law.rule: Every 4-6 seconds the environment must visibly and physically evolve.
forbidden: Same room appearance for longer than 6 seconds
Same lighting state for longer than 6 seconds
Same pressure state for longer than 6 seconds
Subtle changes — all evolution must be readable on a phone screen
visual_escalation_law.enforcement: Each segment visual_prompt contains explicit 3-4 second event blocks. Runway must execute each event in sequence.

runtime_architecture.notes: Strain minimum 14 seconds. Breakaway is the emotional PIVOT. Supremacy is the LOUDEST moment — ascending, gold everywhere, expansion not escape.

mobius_loop.combined_sentence: Because every day you stay, you call suffocation loyalty.
mobius_loop.visual_seam: Camera accelerates forward into absolute #1A1A1A black void node starting at 43s. 100% black frame achieved by 44.5s. Opening frame of hook emerges from this identical void vector. Loop is invisible on repeat.

audio_design.final_segment_treatment: ElevenLabs final segment: stability 0.65, style 0.0. Voice trails on call with flat pitch — NO downward inflection. Grammatically suspended. Resolves at loop restart.
audio_design.music_fade: NO FADE. Hard BPM-locked cut at 45.00s. Zero-cross edit at seam.

visual_prompt.primary_prompt: 9:16 vertical cinematic medium shot. Monolithic brutalist cast-concrete containment chamber. Flat matte black #1A1A1A surfaces. Dead center: solid bone-white #F5F2EB human silhouette — human presence only, zero anatomical detail. Heavy volumetric crimson #DC143C light hazes the background. Geometric gold #C6A94F stress lines slice clean vectors through the concrete structure. Central vertical third of frame is an empty dark high-contrast negative space runway — subtitle corridor sacred.
anatomy_exclusions: DO NOT generate skeleton or organs
DO NOT generate any biological tissue or body structure
Environmental architecture ONLY. Psychological suffocation. Not anatomical.
visual_prompt.runway_prompt_modifier: Hard-geometry brutalist aesthetic. Sealed vault, pressure chamber, containment structure. Bone-white silhouette is human presence only — not an anatomical subject. No organic morphing. Rigid geometric transitions only. Single dominant camera vector per clip.

global_visual_matrix.rendering_engine: Runway Gen-3 Alpha Turbo — brutalist pressure vault aesthetic, hard-geometry only, no organic drift, no anatomy
anti_drift_rules: NO liquid fluid or organic morphing — geometry must remain rigid
NO floating particles or debris crossing the central subtitle corridor
NO lens flares anywhere in the frame
ALL transitions are hard matching cuts or rapid linear wipes — no dissolves
Single dominant camera vector per clip segment — no multi-vector chaos
Maintain 9:16 vertical framing at all times
NO anatomical structures of any kind

subtitle_corridor.protection: SACRED — central vertical corridor must remain clear at all times
subtitle_corridor.notes: All particles shards HUD elements light planes and geometry must remain outside the central subtitle zone. Non-negotiable for mobile readability.

chromatic_aberration.intensity: 4-5px RGB split on all crimson interference events; 1px baseline during gold telemetry sequences

motion_blur.intensity: moderate — 3-4px directional blur aligned to camera movement axis

script.full_text: You call suffocation loyalty. You have given years to a room that stopped growing long before you did. Every morning you shrink yourself to fit. Every meeting you trade possibility for familiarity. Not your time. Not your energy. Your oxygen. They've been breathing your air. You did not fail the room. You outgrew it. The debt clears the moment you stop asking permission. Not when it is comfortable. Now. Take back your air. Your pace. Your ambition. The walls were not your limit. They were your warmup. Because every day you stay, you call
script.mobius_note: Final word 'call' is grammatically suspended. Resolves at loop restart as 'suffocation loyalty.' Combined: 'Because every day you stay, you call suffocation loyalty.'
script.pacing_note: DR_NKRUMAH deliberate cadence. Structural pauses after loyalty / you did / familiarity / your air. CRITICAL REGISTER SHIFT at You did not fail the room — voice drops from observation to declaration. Now is one word with a full beat of silence after it. They were your warmup lands hard and ends clean.

emotional_register_guide.hook_to_strain: Flat, diagnostic, low energy — reading a verdict
emotional_register_guide.breakaway_pivot: You did not fail the room. You outgrew it. — first moment of power. Voice shifts up.
emotional_register_guide.breakaway_close: Not when it is comfortable. Now. — urgent, clipped, no softening
emotional_register_guide.supremacy: Take back your air. — each phrase is a command. Full stop between each. They were your warmup. — final line, maximum conviction.
emotional_register_guide.loop: Flat pitch, voice trails on call — grammatically open

segments.visual_prompt: 9:16 vertical cinematic. Camera already in motion at frame zero — no fade-in. Continuous axial push into brutalist black #1A1A1A vault. Bone-white silhouette centered in subtitle corridor. Vault has no visible ceiling. Gold #C6A94F telemetry lines faintly visible on concrete walls. Crimson #DC143C atmospheric pressure barely perceptible at extreme borders.
segments.camera: Linear Z-axis push forward — single vector, hypnotic pace

segments.text: You have given years to a room that stopped growing long before you did. Every morning you shrink yourself to fit.
segments.visual_prompt: Heavy downward vertical crane descent into monolithic brutalist vault. Concrete wall columns physically step inward every 3 feet — architecture narrows as camera descends. The silhouette does not move. The room closes around it. Crimson pressure rises from the floor. Gold telemetry lines begin dimming. Central subtitle corridor remains clean matte black.
segments.camera: Slow heavy downward vertical crane descent — single vector, weight and inevitability

segments.text: Every meeting you trade possibility for familiarity. Not your time. Not your energy. Your oxygen. They've been breathing your air. You did not fail the room. You outgrew it.
segments.visual_prompt:
FOUR SEQUENTIAL PHYSICAL TRANSFORMATIONS — execute in order no overlap:

[0:16-0:20] COLUMNS MOVE INWARD: Geometric concrete columns step 2 feet closer in hard mechanical movement. Silhouette flanked by closer walls. Crimson haze intensifies at all borders.

[0:20-0:24] CEILING LOWERS: Heavy concrete ceiling plane descends from above. Slow crushing. Vault becomes a compression chamber. Gold #C6A94F telemetry lines flicker.

[0:24-0:27] TELEMETRY SHUTS OFF: Gold lines extinguish left to right in sequence until all are dark. Only crimson and black remain. Silhouette luminance dropping.

[0:27-0:30] FIRST FRACTURE: A single sharp geometric crack splits the ceiling. Gold light bleeds through it. Crimson still at maximum density at frame edges — but the crack is unmistakable. The fracture appears exactly as You outgrew it hits.
segments.strain_pivot_note: You did not fail the room. You outgrew it. lands during the first fracture — visual and reframe land simultaneously.
segments.camera: Extremely slow axial push forward — micro-acceleration on You outgrew it

segments.text: The debt clears the moment you stop asking permission. Not when it is comfortable. Now.
segments.visual_prompt: Hard structural rupture expanding from the first fracture. Geometric cracks expand across all vault walls along precise vector lines — architecture failing outward not inward. Bone-white #F5F2EB geometric light PLANES — not beams not flares — expand horizontally OUTWARD from behind the central silhouette toward the left and right frame edges only. NO LENS FLARE. NO BLOOM. NO OVEREXPOSURE. Central vertical third remains high-contrast dark corridor — silhouette fully readable and ascending. Chromatic aberration peaks at 4-5px.
segments.camera: Sudden rapid linear Z-axis push forward — single vector acceleration — velocity signals permission

segments.text: Take back your air. Your pace. Your ambition. The walls were not your limit. They were your warmup.
segments.visual_prompt:
Vault walls fragment outward in precise geometric shards — controlled, definitive. Silhouette ascends into open space. Ahead in the far field: gold #C6A94F structural latticework — initially incomplete. FOUR SEQUENTIAL ASSEMBLY EVENTS as silhouette approaches:

[0:37-0:39] LATTICEWORK VISIBLE: Gold structural framework visible in far field — unfinished bridges, open vectors, incomplete towers. Geometry is expansive not enclosing.

[0:39-0:40] FIRST BRIDGE SPAN COMPLETES: A horizontal bridge section clicks into place across a gap in the far-field latticework. Hard geometric connection. No organic morphing — one rigid section snapping into position.

[0:40-0:41] NEAREST TOWER EXTENDS: The closest gold tower rises upward by one geometric floor. Hard vertical extension. Single axis movement only.

[0:41-0:43] FRAMEWORK SECTIONS CLICK INTO PLACE: Two additional latticework sections connect in sequence. Structure is still incomplete — the future is mid-construction, not finished. The silhouette rises toward it. Frame at peak brightness. Subtitle corridor fully open.

CRITICAL: All assembly events are HARD GEOMETRIC CONNECTIONS — rigid sections snapping into fixed positions. NO organic growth. NO fluid morphing. The future responds to movement with precision, not softness.
segments.supremacy_direction_note: NOT escape. ARRIVAL. The gold structures ASSEMBLE as the silhouette approaches — the future responds to movement. Four timed geometric events. Each one is a rigid snap-connection, not organic.
segments.camera: Smooth powerful upward elevator lift — single ascending vector — destination visible in the far field

segments.text: Because every day you stay, you call
segments.mobius_note: Grammatically suspended on 'call' — resolves at loop restart with 'suffocation loyalty.' Do not resolve inflection. Do not add completion.
segments.visual_prompt: Camera rapidly accelerates forward down a pure black central corridor. All gold and light elements pass behind the lens field. Frame plunges into absolute matte black #1A1A1A by 44.5s. This exact void is the origin point of the opening frame. Loop is invisible on repeat.
segments.camera: High-velocity forward tunnel plunge into pure void — single Z-axis vector — no deceleration

voice_settings.speed_note: 0.90 targets 44s for 89-word script at DR_NKRUMAH cadence. If render lands under 42s reduce to 0.85. If over 46s increase to 0.93.

final_segment_override.note: Flat pitch on call — no downward emotional resolution. Voice suspends. Loop takes over.

elevenLabs_config.voice_notes: DR_NKRUMAH_VOICE_ID hardcode in generate-reel.ts overrides to C9Uh5MFptuXa176UlaXE regardless.

subtitle_config.size_note: Large, readable without effort on a phone screen. Not decorative. Integrated into the visual.

music_config.description: Industrial sub-bass pressure tone at 85 BPM. Heavy sidechain compression pumping 0-30s. Sudden dynamic drop to isolated crystalline pulse at 30s — rupture signal. Music LIFTS at 37s alongside supremacy — upward tonal chord gold register ascending momentum. Hard BPM-locked cut at 45.00s.
music_config.loop_seam_note: Zero-cross edit at 45.00s seam. No fade. No decay. Absolute cut. Imperceptible on infinite repeat.
music_config.mood_arc: Oppressive compression (0-30s) → Fracture surge (30-37s) → Ascending gold momentum (37-43s) → Void plunge (43-45s)
music_config.music_register_note: Supremacy music RISES — upward momentum not just pressure release. Should feel like acceleration toward something.

instagram_config.caption: The walls were not your limit. They were your warmup. #NDCH #DeterminedChampions #OxygenDebt #MindsetShift #ElitePerformance
instagram_config.alt_text: Brutalist black pressure vault fracturing open — bone-white silhouette ascending toward gold geometric structures assembling in the distance

core_script_changes: Theme reframed: You did not fail the room. You outgrew it. is the emotional pivot at breakaway
Supremacy: Take back your air. Your pace. Your ambition. The walls were not your limit. They were your warmup.
Removed adverbs Slowly / Methodically — lazy work
Removed The environment is not attacking you — not-X setup cut
Breakaway: The debt clears the moment you stop asking permission. Not when it is comfortable. Now.
First fracture in strain syncs visually with You outgrew it
They are breathing -> They've been breathing: accusation to realization
Supremacy: gold structures ASSEMBLE as silhouette approaches — four timed geometric snap events
